seoTitle: Reservoir vs Rheola — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Reservoir and Rheola. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Reservoir and Rheola.
heading: Reservoir vs Rheola — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Reservoir, Victoria and Rheola, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Reservoir and Rheola have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Reservoir or Rheola safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Reservoir has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Rheola scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Reservoir scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Rheola scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Reservoir or Rheola?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Reservoir has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
